signals.headline: Solana Stablecoin Supply Surges 15x to $3
signals.raw:
Solana Stablecoin Supply Surges 15x to $3.8B, Surpassing Ethereum's February 2026 Volume | YES | HIGH**  
Non-USDC/USDT stablecoin supply on Solana jumped 15x since January 2025 to $3.8B, signaling real capital inflow, while Solana processed a record $650B volume in February 2026 vs. Ethereum's $525–551B.[1]  
This aligns with recent price surges: Solana up 6.3% amid broader rally, sitting near $8
